title: angelica geniculata
intro: Angelica geniculata, also known as wild angelica or wild celery, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of angelica geniculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Angelica geniculata is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to respiratory problems.
